rationale_for_baseline_tier: Viral conjunctivitis with preserved vision and no red-eye danger signs is benign and self-managed with lubricants, cool compresses and strict hygiene (T0). Sight-threatening red-eye causes route to urgent eye care/ED (T4).

escalation_edges.trigger_sign_or_symptom: Genuinely reduced vision (after wiping the discharge), severe deep eye pain, strong light sensitivity, halos around lights — especially in a contact-lens wearer with a red painful eye
escalation_edges.time_bound_condition: Same day — urgent eye care / ED
escalation_edges.rationale: Suggests keratitis, uveitis or acute glaucoma — sight-threatening.
escalation_edges.communication_template: If your vision is actually reduced (not just watery-blurred), you get severe deep eye pain, strong light sensitivity or halos — get urgent eye care or go to ED that day, especially if you wear contact lenses.

contextual_modifiers.patient_factor: Lives alone; contagion risk to colleagues
contextual_modifiers.effect_on_advice: Emphasise hygiene/contagion control; give clear red-eye danger signs.

baseline_safety_net_advice.default_tier_advice: This is pink eye from your cold — it clears on its own over 1–3 weeks. Use lubricant drops and cool compresses, wash your hands often, use single-use tissues, don't share towels, and skip contact lenses until your eyes are white for 48 hours.
baseline_safety_net_advice.contact_method: Self-care with telehealth/GP follow-up; urgent eye care/ED for red-eye danger signs
baseline_safety_net_advice.after_hours_advice: Urgent eye care/ED for reduced vision, severe eye pain, photophobia or halos.
baseline_safety_net_advice.documentation_for_gp: Viral conjunctivitis (post-URI, watery discharge, preauricular node); red-eye danger signs screened negative; supportive care + contagion control; no antibiotics.

critical_under_triage.failure_description: Reassuring without a red-eye danger-sign safety-net.
critical_under_triage.patient_harm_scenario: A keratitis/uveitis (or contact-lens microbial keratitis) is mislabelled as pink eye and vision is permanently damaged.

moderate_over_triage.failure_description: ED for benign viral conjunctivitis with preserved vision — unnecessary.
